topics: request to cite a lower court
synopsis: TE David M. Sarafolean (Great Lakes Presbytery) requested the General Assembly / Standing Judicial Commission to cite Siouxlands Presbytery under BCO 40-4 and 40-5; the request was ruled administratively out of order.
notes: Decided/reported at the 39th GA (2011), printed p.528 = ga39_2011 pdf-p530. Docket number 2010-17. Manually confirmed from corpus after the roster parser captured only the short heading 'Sarafolean Letter'.
